entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: The crop studied, Arachis hypogaea L.

entities.name: ELEVATED CO2
entities.description: Increased levels of carbon dioxide, specifically 550 and 700 ppm

entities.name: AMBIENT CO2
entities.description: Normal carbon dioxide levels, specifically 380 ppm

entities.name: OPEN TOP CHAMBERS
entities.description: Experimental setup used to maintain specific CO2 levels

entities.name: KERNEL QUALITY
entities.description: The overall nutritional and chemical quality of the groundnut kernels

entities.name: HAULM NUTRITIONAL QUALITY
entities.description: The nutritional quality of the groundnut haulm

entities.name: KERNEL YIELD
entities.description: The amount of kernels produced per plant

entities.name: POD YIELD
entities.description: The amount of pods produced

entities.name: PLANT HEIGHT
entities.description: The vertical growth of the plant

entities.name: SPECIFIC LEAF AREA
entities.description: The ratio of leaf area to leaf dry mass

entities.name: ROOT AREA
entities.description: The area covered by the root system

entities.name: ROOT VOLUME
entities.description: The volume of the root system

entities.name: SPECIFIC LEAF WEIGHT
entities.description: The weight of the leaf per unit area

entities.name: ROOT DRY WEIGHT
entities.description: The mass of the roots after drying

entities.name: METABOLIZING ENERGY
entities.description: The energy available for metabolism in the haulm

entities.name: IN-VITRO ORGANIC MATTER DIGESTIBILITY
entities.description: The digestibility of organic matter in the haulm measured in-vitro

entities.name: ASH CONTENT
entities.description: The inorganic residue remaining after combustion in the haulm

entities.name: NITROGEN CONTENT
entities.description: The amount of nitrogen present in the haulm

entities.name: KERNEL OIL CONTENT
entities.description: The percentage of oil in the kernels

entities.name: PROTEIN CONTENT
entities.description: The percentage of protein in the kernels

entities.name: FATTY ACID CONTENT
entities.description: The composition of fatty acids in the kernels

entities.name: KERNEL IRON CONTENT
entities.description: The amount of iron in the kernels

entities.name: MANGANESE CONTENT
entities.description: The amount of manganese in the kernels

entities.name: COPPER CONTENT
entities.description: The amount of copper in the kernels

entities.name: CALCIUM CONTENT
entities.description: The amount of calcium in the kernels

entities.name: GENOTYPE BY TRAIT BIPLOT ANALYSIS
entities.description: A statistical method used to analyze the relationship between genotypes and traits

entities.name: ICGV 03043
entities.description: A specific groundnut genotype identified as best performing under elevated CO2

relationships.description: no significant effect on pod yield
no significant effect on fatty acid content
no significant effect on iron content
no significant effect on manganese content
identified ICGV 03043 as the best performing genotype
maintains high kernel yield across CO2 levels
maintains high oil content across CO2 levels
